headline: AM Best Comments on Credit Ratings of Vantage Group Holdings Ltd.’s Members Following the Appointment of New Leadership
summary: OLDWICK, N.J., July 17, 2026--AM Best has commented that the Credit Ratings (ratings) of Vantage Risk Ltd. (Bermuda) and its affiliates, Vantage Risk Specialty Insurance Company and Vantage Risk Assurance Company (both domiciled in Wilmington, DE), which do business as Vantage Group, remain unchanged following an announced leadership change.

headline: Investors Heavily Search Arch Capital Group Ltd. (ACGL): Here is What You Need to Know

headline: Arch Capital: The Real Test Begins As Reinsurance Pricing Softens
summary: Arch Capital Group is rated a Buy, contingent on maintaining profitability and book value growth amid declining reinsurance pricing. For more on ACGL stock.
